sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_uuids (id UInt32, uuid_value UUID) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
UPDATE test_uuids SET uuid_value = reinterpretAsUUID(reverse(unhex('101112131415161718191a1b1c1d1e1f'))) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, reinterpretAsUUID(reverse(unhex(concat('00000000000000000000000000000000', toHex(uuid_value))))) AS new_uuid FROM test_uuids;
SELECT id, reinterpretAsUUID(replace(toHex(uuid_value), '0', 'f')) AS modified_uuid FROM test_uuids WHERE id IN (1);
